title: telanthera ramosissima
intro: Telanthera ramosissima, also known as the hairy four o'clock, is a species of flowering plant in the family Nyctaginaceae, characterized by its hairy stems and leaves. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Telanthera ramosissima can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
